creator: kristinacors
caption: Anyone else hate spending $30 on a sandwich in the airport every time you travel? #travelhacks #creditcardrewards #airportlounges #prioritypass #airporthacks

transcription.text: Travel Hacks No One Teaches You, Episode 9. If you're sick and tired of paying $30 for food and water every time you're at the airport, this hack is for you. It's called Priority Pass. It's a lounge membership program that gives you access to 1,700 airport lounges in over 600 cities worldwide. And this is regardless of the airline or class you're flying. Now, membership starts at $99 a year, but here's how you can get it for free. So if you have these credit cards, the Platinum Card from American Express, Chase Sapphire Reserve, and Capital One Venture X Rewards credit card, you get access to Priority Pass for free. That means you can get free food at the airport every time you travel, and it saves you so much money. Also, don't forget, lounge access isn't just about food. It also gets you things like complimentary cocktails and coffee, private bathrooms and showers, towels, fresh toiletries, nap pods, and even minute suites, which includes private rooms with a daybed and desk. Some airports have quiet zones, and of course, fast Wi-Fi and charging stations everywhere. Priority Pass members can even access things like discounted car rentals. So share this with your travel buddy and follow the series for travel hacks no one teaches you.
